category.title: Select Issue Category
category.subtitle: Choose the category that best describes the civic problem you want to report.
category.roadsDesc: Damaged roads, open potholes, or street cave-ins.
category.garbageDesc: Overflowing public bins, dump piles, or street waste.
category.waterDesc: Leaking pipelines, dirty water, or no supply.
category.safetyDesc: Hanging electrical wires, open manholes, or safety hazards.
category.otherDesc: Any other civic issues that do not fit above.

form.title: Report Details
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide details like landmarks or specific problems (min 10 chars, max 500)...
form.voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
form.voiceError: Voice error occurred. Please type manually.

validation.tooShortDescription: Description must be at least 10 characters.

confirmation.nextStepsDesc: Your report is saved locally. If offline, it will automatically synchronize when connection is restored. Local authorities will review details.
confirmation.offlineNotice: You are currently offline. The report is queued locally.
